tracks.title: Computer Networking & Traffic Analysis
tracks.description: Master TCP/IP protocols, DNS, subnetting, and packet analysis using Wireshark.

milestones.title: Network Protocols & Packet Inspection
milestones.description: Inspect network traffic, diagnose exploits, and map network topologies.

resources.title: Network Security & Wireshark Packet Analysis
resources.notes: Capture packets, analyze 3-way handshakes, and spot unencrypted credentials.

tracks.title: Web Application Vulnerabilities & Penetration Testing
tracks.description: Exploit OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities: SQL Injection, XSS, CSRF, and SSRF using Burp Suite.

milestones.title: OWASP Exploitation & Security Auditing
milestones.description: Audit web applications and construct proof-of-concept exploits.

resources.title: Web Application Penetration Testing Course
resources.notes: Intercept HTTP requests, exploit SQLi endpoints, and bypass auth guards.

resources.title: PortSwigger Web Security Academy Labs
resources.notes: Complete hands-on SQL Injection and Cross-Site Scripting lab exercises.

tracks.title: Network Defense & Incident Response
tracks.description: Harden server configurations, configure firewalls, and analyze intrusion logs.

milestones.title: System Hardening & SIEM Analysis
milestones.description: Defend networks against active threats and maintain security compliance.

resources.title: Practical Cyber Defense & Log Analysis
resources.notes: Analyze syslog, auth.log, and web server access logs for intrusion indicators.
